name: Rounds Golf & Lounge
about: Rounds Golf & Lounge is an indoor golf and games venue in Wilmington, NC, featuring PGA-level Full Swing simulators and a full-service bar and kitchen. The venue offers a multi-bay experience with food, drinks, and a premium simulator setup. Located in the Mayfaire Town Center, it is designed for both casual play and private events, with a focus on technology and social atmosphere. Pricing is structured on a per-bay, per-hour basis, catering to groups of various sizes for golf, games, and dining.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA-level Full Swing simulator technology with real ball flight tracking
80+ championship courses and arcade-style games for varied gameplay
Upscale lounge atmosphere with craft cocktails and local beer on tap
Private bay rentals accommodating groups up to 12 people

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with Ledo Pizza menu, pub-style food, and daily specials
Craft cocktails, local beer on tap, wines by the bottle, and dedicated wine wall

simulator_hardware.notes: Infrared lightwave technology with high-speed cameras for real ball flight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar with craft cocktails, local beer, and Ledo Pizza.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and simulator availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Rounds Golf & Lounge is kid-friendly, with accommodations for families and events like birthday parties.
